authors_reviews.title: Great case. What more could you ask for?
authors_reviews.text: Very light case which offers great protection.Had it now 3 months and the case gives me confidence whenever handling my fold device. There's been a few inadvertent drops and the case has protected device.Also love the clear case to show off my fold color and the magnetic ring creates a strong hold whenever I need to anchor my device.
authors_reviews.author: AkinBoy

authors_reviews.title: Nice case and screen protector
authors_reviews.text: You can't go wrong with this price. The material is strudy plastic and got the sctlreen protector as well. Have to use it longer to check if the case turns yellowish like my previous model cases.
authors_reviews.author: Momma249

authors_reviews.title: Good case. Screen protector meh
authors_reviews.text: Case is good. Fits perfectly. The screen protector is several mm smaller than the case and lint/pet hair gets stuck to the edges.
authors_reviews.author: Melanie

authors_reviews.title: Great quality without the Apple Store price
authors_reviews.text: Glad I bought this case! The ones at the Apple Store were around $60 and this one does the job just as well. Fits perfectly, feels sturdy, and protects the phone without being bulky. Definitely worth the price.
authors_reviews.author: Sammy

authors_reviews.title: Very good!!
authors_reviews.text: I love it! It’s VERY DURABLE! And doesn’t get yellow or anything. And for something so cheap it’s very good condition! HIGHLY recommend if you want a cute clear phone case!
authors_reviews.author: Emily Wolfe

authors_reviews.title: Get it!
authors_reviews.text: This case is GREAT and for the price even better! It’s just as good as the one they were trying to sell me at the store for 45$ and that one didn’t even have the tempered glass. The screen protector was easy to install as well!
authors_reviews.author: isabella medina

authors_reviews.title: Clear is Not But Always Good
authors_reviews.text: I purchased something very similar for my iPhone 13 and it's pretty much the same case, different brand. So my review will be repetitive. The MagSafe Safe is also a nice addition and works well with Apple accessories and products. It just seems that everything is built around Apple when it comes this department. This covers the entire case which again is important. This is military grade however as much as I want to believe it; this is made of a hard plastic. It may sustain and protect from minor dings and bumps but I'm not sure how it would fare if it was dropped from a higher point. The cut out for the camera is also a bit concerning. Even though the cover is slightly higher where the camera is, I don't feel it would protect it, whether it was laid flat down or accidentally dropped. It's hard not to like this case but with minor flaws; yellowing, military grade and camera coverage - you need to think what makes sense to you. I like it - but liking isn't always a good thing.Thanks so much for reading—happy shopping!
authors_reviews.author: The Review Knight 🦇
